title: Inside CodeGrind's Secure AI Assistance: Prompt Safety and Model Flexibility
summary: Explore CodeGrind's secure AI assistant, featuring Azure OpenAI integration with GPT-4o, flexible model switching, and robust prompt safety controls for a reliable coding practice experience.

social.bluesky_text: CodeGrind's AI assistant now features Azure OpenAI GPT-4o for intelligent coding practice guidance. Enjoy secure interactions with prompt safety controls and flexible model switching. Learn more: https://rivie13.github.io/blog/2026/03/18/codegrind-secure-ai-assistance-workflow/ #CodeGrind #AI #CodingPractice #GPT4o
social.linkedin_text: CodeGrind is enhancing the coding practice experience with a secure AI assistant powered by Azure OpenAI and GPT-4o. Our integration focuses on providing intelligent guidance, robust prompt safety controls, and flexible model switching to support your learning journey. The AI assistant is seamlessly integrated into our platform, acting as a guided learning partner. Discover the details of our secure AI assistance and flexible model options: https://rivie13.github.io/blog/2026/03/18/codegrind-secure-ai-assistance-workflow/ #CodeGrind #AICoding #DeveloperTools #GPT4o #AzureOpenAI #CodingInterviews
